reviews.comment:
Podría mejorar un poco la atención a las mesas. A veces el mozo te lleva a la mesa, otras te dan el grito desde el mostrador. En un plazo de unos días cambio. La comida, exquisita.

(Translated by Google)
The table service could be improved a bit. Sometimes the waiter takes you to your table, other times they shout at you from the counter. I'll change that within a few days. The food was exquisite.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXNU1uOHFnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Desayunamos de paso, por la hora nadie de gente (5am). Baños sucios. La atención de Raúl muy cordial y rápida. Un genio.

(Translated by Google)
We had breakfast on the go; there was no one around at that hour (5 am). The bathrooms were dirty. Raúl's service was very friendly and quick. He's a gem.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXNE5fd0JBEAE

reviews.comment:
Picos playeros para atender mucha gente que concurre a cargar combustible. Se espera mucho y te retrasa el viaje

(Translated by Google)
Beach peaks to serve the crowds of people who come to refuel. There's a long wait and it delays your trip.

reviews.comment:
Poco personal para atender , colas para cargar combustible , colas para tomar un café.No había mesas limpias para sentarse.

(Translated by Google)
There weren't enough staff to serve customers, there were queues for fuel, and queues for coffee. There weren't any clean tables to sit on.
